response: The sales team sent a recap of a workshop hosted yesterday with 15 enterprise customers, which noted key feedback (8 customers requesting better bulk import tools, 5 citing SSO as a blocker, positive reviews for the new analytics dashboard) and an unexpected 3 customers expressing interest in the sales team’s internal tool as a standalone product. A follow-up report documenting the full workshop findings is attached, and no explicit action items are specified in the recap.
